name: beads-superpowers
description: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 6 more AI coding agents. Composable skills + persistent task memory.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows with persistent beads task memory
interface.longDescription: Use Beads Superpowers to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows — with every task tracked in a persistent, Dolt-backed beads database that survives across sessions.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
